mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is near zero and CPIAUCSL is stable, equities reprice as discount-rate pressure stays muted; this supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next month because falling policy-rate expectations dominate weak growth news.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered low-rate/low-inflation periods do not produce above-baseline 20d SPX returns, or if negative 20d returns occur in more than 60% of such instances.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in UNRATE above its recent trend signals a deterioration in household income and consumption demand, which lowers earnings expectations and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if unemployment-surge triggers are followed by positive 20d SPX returns in more than 50% of cases or if Rank IC is not negative in any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained recovery in INDPRO after a prior contraction raises realized industrial activity and signals inventory rebuilding, which improves near-term earnings revisions and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO turns positive on a 3-month change after a prior 3-month decline
failure_condition: Reject if post-contraction INDPRO rebounds are not followed by positive 60d SPX returns more often than not, or if the sign relationship flips in more than one rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A drop in RSAFS reflects weaker retail demand and softer revenue growth, so when sales decelerate the market should discount weaker earnings and produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if negative RSAFS growth triggers are followed by positive 20d SPX returns in more than 55% of instances or if the signal has no edge versus unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS falls and UNRATE rises together, labor-market deterioration is broad enough to threaten consumption and earnings, creating negative S&P 500 returns over the next month that are stronger than either series alone.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-down/UNRATE-up condition does not outperform each single-series signal, or if positive 20d SPX returns still dominate in the joint-bad labor regime.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST after a prior plateau signals collapsing construction demand and spillovers into cyclicals, so the S&P 500 should underperform over the next 5 trading days as investors reprice growth-sensitive sectors.
failure_condition: Reject if large HOUST drops are not followed by weaker 5d SPX returns than baseline, or if the sign of the effect is positive in a majority of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: An unchanged or falling FEDFUNDS rate during a period of elevated CPIAUCSL reduces the probability of near-term tightening surprises, which supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation rate > 2.5% and FEDFUNDS change <= 0
failure_condition: Reject if high-inflation/policy-inert periods do not outperform unconditional 20d returns, or if tightening expectations still dominate despite stable FEDFUNDS.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 contracts while RSAFS weakens, aggregate demand is shrinking across both production and consumption channels, so S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter should be negative as earnings estimates are revised down.
failure_condition: Reject if joint GDPC1 contraction and RSAFS weakness fail to predict negative 60d SPX returns, or if the conditional hit rate is not worse than 50% in recession-like periods.
